string.text: {=kR2Ytv8b}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=RWxrs5Eq}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, a noble clan of the Emirate of Granada.

{=CXKUcdW8}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the Imperial Court and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the Emirate of Granada.

{=9J7mJcAM}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Emirate of Granada.
{=V4ChyNeg}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, the most ancient and noble of the Berber tribes.

{=85zTxYEJ}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of the Emirate of Granada. The Christians we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
